title: ANIMAL CONTROL - 211info
text: CITY OF ALBANY POLICE DEPARTMENT ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services which includes responding to reports of animal cruelty, stray pets, and local animal code violations. 2600 Pacific Boulevard SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 917-7680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Dispatch (541) 917-7680 Non-Emergency INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None AREA SERVED: City of Albany SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Services: Animal Control Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - MEDICATION DROP BOX CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - ALBANY POLICE DEPARTMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
